title: Icy Korean Yogurt Lotus-Leaf-Wrapped Ice Cream Stone-Bowl-Dolsot
description: This icy treat features a tender, malty ice cream wrapped in lotus leaves and served in a stone-bowl-dolsot for an Asian-inspired dessert.

ingredients.name: ice cream base mix (vanilla, chocolate, or any flavor you like)

instructions: Prepare the ice cream base by mixing yogurt and coconut milk. Add your chosen flavor base.
Chill the prepared ice cream in a refrigerator for at least an hour.
Wash and dry lotus leaves, then slice them to fit around your ice cream container.
Place a piece of sliced lotus leaf on the stone-bowl-dolsot. Spoon the chilled ice cream into the lotus leaf.
Carefully place the stone bowl-dolsot with the wrapped ice cream over boiling water or steam for about 10 minutes to melt and soften the leaves slightly.
